Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
 (**************************************************************************************************

  Scott's representation theorem

  A proof of the representation theorem for the λ-calculus, first proven by Dana Scott in 1980.
  It shows that any model for the λ-calculus can be viewed as the set of endomorphisms of some
  (reflexive) object in some category. Because of univalence, we can frame this as "the endomorphism
  theory construction has a right inverse".

  Contents
  1. A proof that the object (theory_presheaf) can be exponentiated [theory_presheaf_exponentiable]
  2. A construction of the lambda endomorphism theory of theory_presheaf [presheaf_lambda_theory]
  3. An isomorphism between the two λ-theories [presheaf_lambda_theory_iso]
  4. The right inverse [endomorphism_theory_right_inverse]

 **************************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Coreflections.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Cartesian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Sigma.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiber.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IdempotentsAndSplitting.Retracts.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.StandardFiniteSets.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Tuples.

Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.AlgebraicTheories.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.AlgebraicTheoryCategory.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.AlgebraicTheoryMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.Examples.EndomorphismTheory.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.Examples.Plus1Presheaf.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.LambdaTheories.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.LambdaTheoryCategory.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.LambdaTheoryMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.PresheafCategory.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.PresheafMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.Presheaves.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.ReflexiveObjects.

Local Open Scope algebraic_theories.
Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp.

(** * 1. A proof that the object (theory_presheaf) can be exponentiated *)

Section RepresentationTheorem.

  Context (L : β_lambda_theory).

  Let pow
    (n : nat)
    : Product (stn n) (presheaf_cat L) (λ _, theory_presheaf L)
    := bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L) (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat _) (bin_products_presheaf_cat _) n.

  Let PO
    (n : nat)
    : presheaf L
    := ProductObject _ _ (pow n).

  Let pow'
    (n : nat)
    : Product (stn n) (presheaf_cat L) (λ _, theory_presheaf L)
    := products_presheaf_cat L (stn n) (λ _, (theory_presheaf L)).

  Let PO'
    (n : nat)
    : presheaf L
    := ProductObject _ _ (pow' n).

  Let pow_iso
    (n : nat)
    : z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
    := z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n).

  Let pow_f
    (n : nat)
    : presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
    := morphism_from_z_iso _ _ (pow_iso n).

  Let pow_f_inv
    (n : nat)
    : presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
    := inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n).

  Local Definition BPO
    (P P' : presheaf L)
    : presheaf L
    := BinProductObject _ (bin_products_presheaf_cat _ P P').

  Section Exponentiable.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
n: ℕ
t: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) n
:
hSet
P n : hSet

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
n: ℕ
t: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) n
:
hSet
P n : hSet

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
n: ℕ
t: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) n
:
hSet
(⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn → L n

L n

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
n: ℕ
t: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) n
:
hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
L n
 exact (var i').
      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
n: ℕ
t: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) n
:
hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
L n
 exact (pr2 t).
    Defined.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
presheaf_exponent_morphism_data P n (op a f) =
op (presheaf_exponent_morphism_data P m a) f

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
presheaf_exponent_morphism_data P n (op a f) =
op (presheaf_exponent_morphism_data P m a) f

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
op (presheaf_exponent_morphism_data P m a) f =
op (pr1 a)
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
   (let c := invmap stnweq i in
    coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
      (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
       f i'
       • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
      (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
   • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
      let c := invmap stnweq i0 in
      coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
        (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
        (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
op (pr1 a)
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
   (let c := invmap stnweq i in
    coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
      (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
       f i'
       • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
      (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
   • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
      let c := invmap stnweq i0 in
      coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
        (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
        (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c)) =
op (pr1 a)
  (λ i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn,
   (let c := invmap stnweq i in
    coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
      (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i') (λ _ : unit, pr2 a)
      c) • f)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
(λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
 (let c := invmap stnweq i in
  coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
    (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
    (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
 • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
    let c := invmap stnweq i0 in
    coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
      (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
      (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c)) =
(λ i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn,
 (let c := invmap stnweq i in
  coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i') (λ _ : unit, pr2 a) c)
 • f)

pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
(λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
 (let c := invmap stnweq i in
  coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
    (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
    (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
 • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
    let c := invmap stnweq i0 in
    coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
      (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
      (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c)) ~
(λ i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn,
 (let c := invmap stnweq i in
  coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i') (λ _ : unit, pr2 a) c)
 • f)

• (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,

      let c := invmap stnweq i in

i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f i'
• (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl t_l))
   • (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
      let c := invmap stnweq i in

i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
(λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 var (stnweq (inl t_l))
 • (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
    let c := invmap stnweq i in

      (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
      (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c)) = var

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
i: (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
(λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 var (stnweq (inl t_l))
 • (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
    let c := invmap stnweq i in
    coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
      (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
      (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c)) ~ var

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
i: (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
var (stnweq (inl j))
• (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   let c := invmap stnweq i in
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c) = var j

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
i: (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl j)) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
   (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
   (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c) = var j

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq stnweq _)).
      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
i: (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn
i': unit
(let c := inr i' in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
• (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   let c := invmap stnweq i in
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c) =
(let c := inr i' in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i') (λ _ : unit, pr2 a) c)
• f
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P: presheaf L
m, n: ℕ
a: BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L) m
:
hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
i: (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn
i': unit
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inr i')) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
   (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
   (λ _ : unit, pr2 (op a f)) c) =
(let c := inr i' in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i') (λ _ : unit, pr2 a) c)
• f

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq stnweq _)).
    Qed.

    Definition presheaf_exponent_morphism
      (P : presheaf L)
      : presheaf_morphism (BPO (plus_1_presheaf P) (theory_presheaf L)) P
      := make_presheaf_morphism _ (presheaf_exponent_is_morphism P).

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: P' n : hSet
theory_presheaf L (1 + n)
 exact (var (stnweq (inr tt))).
    Defined.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_data F n (op a f) =
op (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_data F m a) f

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,

pow':= λ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_data F n (op a f) =
op (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_data F m a) f

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
F (1 + n)
  (op
     (op a (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
      let c := invmap stnweq i in
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
        (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
         f i'
         • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
        (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)) =
presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_data F n (op a f)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
op
  (op a (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
   let c := invmap stnweq i in
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
      f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
     (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c) =
op (op a f) (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
var (stnweq (inr tt))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
op
  (pr1
     (op a (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
   let c := invmap stnweq i in
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
      f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
     (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c) =
op (op a f) (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)

m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
op
  (pr2
     (op a (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
   let c := invmap stnweq i in
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
      f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
     (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c) =
var (stnweq (inr tt))

pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
op
  (pr1
     (op a (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
   let c := invmap stnweq i in
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
      f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
     (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c) =
op (op a f) (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)

P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
op (op a f) (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) =
op a
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl i))
   • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
      let c := invmap stnweq i0 in
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
        (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
         f i'
         • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
        (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c))

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
op a
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl i))
   • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
      let c := invmap stnweq i0 in
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
        (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
         f i'
         • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
        (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)) =
op a
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   f i • (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i0))))

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
(λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 var (stnweq (inl i))
 • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
    let c := invmap stnweq i0 in
    coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
      (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
       f i'
       • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
      (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)) =
(λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 f i • (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i0))))

m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
(λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 var (stnweq (inl i))
 • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
    let c := invmap stnweq i0 in
    coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
      (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
       f i'
       • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
      (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)) ~
(λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 f i • (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i0))))

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
var (stnweq (inl i))
• (λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
   let c := invmap stnweq i in
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
      f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
     (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c) =
f i • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl i)) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c) =
f i • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq stnweq (inl i))).
      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
op
  (pr2
     (op a (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
   let c := invmap stnweq i in
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
      f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
     (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c) =
var (stnweq (inr tt))
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
m, n: ℕ
a: P' m : hSet
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inr tt)) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c) =
var (stnweq (inr tt))

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq stnweq (inr tt))).
    Qed.

    Definition presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism
      {P P' : presheaf L}
      (F : presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P)
      : presheaf_morphism P' (plus_1_presheaf P)
      := make_presheaf_morphism _ (presheaf_exponent_induced_is_morphism F).

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
F =
# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
F =
# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
∏ n : ℕ,
F n =
(# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
      (theory_presheaf L))
   (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F)
 · presheaf_exponent_morphism P) n

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
F n =
(# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
      (theory_presheaf L))
   (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F)
 · presheaf_exponent_morphism P) n

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
(presheaf_exponent_morphism P n
 ∘ # (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
        (theory_presheaf L))
     (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n)%functions =
F n

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
(presheaf_exponent_morphism P n
 ∘ # (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
        (theory_presheaf L))
     (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n)%functions ~
F n

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
(presheaf_exponent_morphism P n
 ∘ # (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
        (theory_presheaf L))
     (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n)%functions
  t = F n t

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
op
  ((# (functor_identity (presheaf_cat L))
      (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n
    ∘ BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
        (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
           (functor_identity (presheaf_cat L) P')
           (constant_functor (presheaf_cat L)
              (presheaf_cat L) (theory_presheaf L) P'))
        n)%functions t)
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      pr2
        (# (constprod_functor2
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
              (theory_presheaf L))
           (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n t))
     (invmap stnweq i)) = F n t

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
F n
  (op
     (op
        (BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
              (functor_identity (presheaf_cat L) P')
              (constant_functor (presheaf_cat L)
                 (presheaf_cat L) (theory_presheaf L)
                 P')) n t)
        (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
      coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
        (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
        (λ _ : unit,
         pr2
           (# (constprod_functor2
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                 (theory_presheaf L))
              (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n
              t)) (invmap stnweq i))) = F n t

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
op
  (op
     (BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
        (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
           (functor_identity (presheaf_cat L) P')
           (constant_functor (presheaf_cat L)
              (presheaf_cat L) (theory_presheaf L) P'))
        n t) (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      pr2
        (# (constprod_functor2
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
              (theory_presheaf L))
           (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n t))
     (invmap stnweq i)) = t

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
op
  (pr1
     (op
        (BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
              (functor_identity (presheaf_cat L) P')
              (constant_functor (presheaf_cat L)
                 (presheaf_cat L) (theory_presheaf L)
                 P')) n t)
        (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      pr2
        (# (constprod_functor2
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
              (theory_presheaf L))
           (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n t))
     (invmap stnweq i)) = pr1 t
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
op
  (pr2
     (op
        (BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
              (functor_identity (presheaf_cat L) P')
              (constant_functor 
                 (presheaf_cat L) 
                 (presheaf_cat L) 
                 (theory_presheaf L) P')) n t)
        (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      pr2
        (# (constprod_functor2
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
              (theory_presheaf L))
           (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n t))
     (invmap stnweq i)) = 
pr2 t

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)

P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
op (pr1 t)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl i))
   • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
      coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
        (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
        (λ _ : unit,
         pr2
           (# (constprod_functor2
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)

              (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n
              t)) (invmap stnweq i0))) = pr1 t

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L

P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
op (pr1 t)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl i))
   • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
      coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
        (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
        (λ _ : unit,

                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                 (theory_presheaf L))
              (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n
              t)) (invmap stnweq i0))) =
op (pr1 t) var

var (stnweq (inl i))
• (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   pr2
     (# (constprod_functor2
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
           (theory_presheaf L))
        (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n t))
  (invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl i))) = var i

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq stnweq _)).

                 P')) n t)
        (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      pr2
        (# (constprod_functor2
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
              (theory_presheaf L))
           (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n t))
     (invmap stnweq i)) = pr2 t
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   pr2
     (# (constprod_functor2
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
           (theory_presheaf L))
        (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n t))
  (invmap stnweq (stnweq (inr tt))) = pr2 t

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
F: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
n: ℕ
t: BPO P' (theory_presheaf L) n
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   pr2
     (# (constprod_functor2
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
           (theory_presheaf L))
        (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism F) n t))
  (inr tt) = pr2 t

        exact (maponpaths
          (λ x, pr1 x n t)
          (id_right (BinProductPr2 _ ((bin_products_presheaf_cat L) _ _)))
        ).
    Qed.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
f: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
f': presheaf_morphism P' (plus_1_presheaf P)
Hf': f =
# (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (f' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ P', plus_1_presheaf P ⟧)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P
f' = presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism f

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
f: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
f': presheaf_morphism P' (plus_1_presheaf P)
Hf': f =
# (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (f' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ P', plus_1_presheaf P ⟧)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P
n: ℕ
t: P' n
f' n t =
pr1
  (# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
        (theory_presheaf L)) f'
   · presheaf_exponent_morphism P) (1 + n)
  (op t (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt)))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
f: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
f': presheaf_morphism P' (plus_1_presheaf P)
Hf': f =
# (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (f' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ P', plus_1_presheaf P ⟧)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P
n: ℕ
t: P' n
(presheaf_exponent_morphism P (1 + n)
 ∘ # (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
        (theory_presheaf L)) f' (1 + n))%functions
  (op t (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = f' n t

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
f: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
f': presheaf_morphism P' (plus_1_presheaf P)
Hf': f =
# (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (f' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ P', plus_1_presheaf P ⟧)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P
n: ℕ
t: P' n
op
  ((f' (1 + n)
    ∘ BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
        (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
           (functor_identity (presheaf_cat L) P')
           (constant_functor (presheaf_cat L)
              (presheaf_cat L) (theory_presheaf L) P'))
        (1 + n))%functions
     (op t (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
      var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + (1 + n) ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      pr2
        (# (constprod_functor2
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
              (theory_presheaf L)) f' (1 + n)
           (op t
              (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
               var (stnweq (inl i0))),,
            var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (invmap stnweq i)) =
f' n t

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
f: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
f': presheaf_morphism P' (plus_1_presheaf P)
Hf': f =
# (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (f' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ P', plus_1_presheaf P ⟧)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P
n: ℕ
t: P' n
(pr12 P) (1 + (1 + n)) (1 + n)
  (op (f' n t)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + (1 + n) ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      pr2
        (# (constprod_functor2
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
              (theory_presheaf L)) f' (1 + n)
           (op t
              (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
               var (stnweq (inl i0))),,
            var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (invmap stnweq i)) =
f' n t

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
P, P': presheaf L
f: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
f': presheaf_morphism P' (plus_1_presheaf P)
Hf': f =
# (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (f' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ P', plus_1_presheaf P ⟧)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P
n: ℕ
t: P' n
op (f' n t)
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   (let c := invmap stnweq i in
    coprod_rect
      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + (1 + n)))
      (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
       var (stnweq (inl i'))
       • (λ j : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
      (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
   • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + (1 + n) ⟧)%stn,
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
        (λ i' : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn, var i')
        (λ _ : unit,
         pr2
           (# (constprod_functor2
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                 (theory_presheaf L)) f' (1 + n)
              (op t
                 (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                  var (stnweq (inl i1))),,
               var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
        (invmap stnweq i0))) = f' n t

n: ℕ
t: P' n
op (f' n t)
  (λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,
   (let c := invmap stnweq i in
    coprod_rect
      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + (1 + n)))
      (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
       var (stnweq (inl i'))
       • (λ j : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
      (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
   • (λ i0 : (⟦ 1 + (1 + n) ⟧)%stn,
      coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))

              (op t
                 (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                  var (stnweq (inl i1))),,
               var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
        (invmap stnweq i0))) = op (f' n t) var

(λ i : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn,

  coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + (1 + n)))

                var (stnweq (inl i1))),,
             var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
      (invmap stnweq i0))) = var

   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + (1 + n)))

            var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (invmap stnweq i)) =
var i

               var (stnweq (inl i0))),,
            var (stnweq (inr tt))))) 
     (invmap stnweq i)) = 
var (stnweq (inr i'))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

f: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
f': presheaf_morphism P' (plus_1_presheaf P)
Hf': f =
# (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (f' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ P', plus_1_presheaf P ⟧)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P
n: ℕ
t: P' n
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(let c := inl i' in
 coprod_rect
   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + (1 + n)))
   (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    var (stnweq (inl i'))
    • (λ j : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
• (λ i : (⟦ 1 + (1 + n) ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn, var i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      pr2
        (# (constprod_functor2
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
              (theory_presheaf L)) f' (1 + n)
           (op t
              (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
               var (stnweq (inl i0))),,
            var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (invmap stnweq i)) =
var (stnweq (inl i'))

  (invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl (dni lastelement i')))) =

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq stnweq _)).

i': unit
pr1
  (BinProductPr2 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L P'
        (theory_presheaf L))) (1 + n)
  (op t (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = var (stnweq (inr i'))

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)

f: presheaf_morphism (BPO P' (theory_presheaf L)) P
f': presheaf_morphism P' (plus_1_presheaf P)
Hf': f =
# (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (f' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ P', plus_1_presheaf P ⟧)
· presheaf_exponent_morphism P

t: P' n
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
tt = i'

        exact (!pr2 iscontrunit i').
    Qed.

  (theory_presheaf L)

pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
is_exponentiable (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L

is_left_adjoint
  (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

f: coreflection_data T
  (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
∃! g : presheaf_cat L ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (plus_1_presheaf T)
            (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)) ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L)) g
· make_coreflection_data (plus_1_presheaf T)
    (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)

  (constprod_functor2

(f
 :

  (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
∏
g' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
     coreflection_data_object
       (make_coreflection_data 
          (plus_1_presheaf T)
          (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)) ⟧,
(f
 :
 presheaf_cat L
 ⟦ constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L) 
     (coreflection_data_object f), T ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L)) g'

    (plus_1_presheaf T) (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)
→ g' = ?g

z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
T: presheaf_cat L
f: coreflection_data T
  (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
presheaf_cat L ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data (plus_1_presheaf T)
     (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)) ⟧
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
T: presheaf_cat L
f: coreflection_data T
  (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
presheaf_morphism
  (BPO (coreflection_data_object f)
     (theory_presheaf L)) T

          exact (f : _ --> _).
        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
T: presheaf_cat L
f: coreflection_data T
  (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
(f
 :
 presheaf_cat L
 ⟦ constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L) (coreflection_data_object f),
 T ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
  (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism
     (f
      :
      presheaf_cat L
      ⟦ constprod_functor2
          (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
          (theory_presheaf L)
          (coreflection_data_object f), T ⟧))
· make_coreflection_data (plus_1_presheaf T)
    (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)
 apply presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_commutes.
        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
T: presheaf_cat L
f: coreflection_data T
  (constprod_functor2
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L))
∏
g' : presheaf_cat L ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
     coreflection_data_object
       (make_coreflection_data (plus_1_presheaf T)
          (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)) ⟧,
(f
 :
 presheaf_cat L
 ⟦ constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L) (coreflection_data_object f),
 T ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
     (theory_presheaf L)) g'
· make_coreflection_data (plus_1_presheaf T)
    (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)
→ g' =
  presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism
    (f
     :
     presheaf_cat L
     ⟦ constprod_functor2
         (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
         (theory_presheaf L)
         (coreflection_data_object f), T ⟧)
 apply presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_unique.
    Defined.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
(exp_app_alt theory_presheaf_exponentiable G
 :
 presheaf_morphism
   (bin_products_presheaf_cat L (pow n)
      (theory_presheaf L)) (theory_presheaf L)) m l =
(G
 :
 presheaf_morphism (pow n)
   (pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
      (theory_presheaf L))) m (pr1 l)
• extend_tuple var (pr2 l)
