L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
φ_adj_inv
  (pr2
     (coreflections_to_is_left_adjoint
        (λ T : presheaf_cat L,
         make_coreflection' (plus_1_presheaf T)
           (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)
           (λ f : coreflection_data T
                    (constprod_functor2
                       (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                       (theory_presheaf L)),
            make_coreflection_arrow
              (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism f)
              (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_commutes
                 f)
              (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_unique
                 f))))) G m l =
G m (pr1 l) • extend_tuple var (pr2 l)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
(counit_from_are_adjoints
   (pr2
      (coreflections_to_is_left_adjoint
         (λ T : presheaf_cat L,
          make_coreflection' (plus_1_presheaf T)
            (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)
            (λ f : coreflection_data T
                     (constprod_functor2
                        (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                        (theory_presheaf L)),
             make_coreflection_arrow
               (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism f)
               (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_commutes
                  f)
               (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_unique
                  f))))) (theory_presheaf L) m
 ∘ # (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
        (theory_presheaf L)) G m)%functions l =
G m (pr1 l) • extend_tuple var (pr2 l)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
pr1
  (# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
        (theory_presheaf L)) G m l) = pr1 G m (pr1 l)
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
(λ i : (⟦ 1 + m ⟧)%stn,
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i')
   (λ _ : unit,
    pr2
      (# (constprod_functor2
            (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
            (theory_presheaf L)) G m l))
   (invmap stnweq i)) = extend_tuple var (pr2 l)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
pr1
  (# (constprod_functor2 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
        (theory_presheaf L)) G m l) = pr1 G m (pr1 l)
 exact (maponpaths (λ x, x _) (presheaf_mor_comp _ G _)).

   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i')
   (λ _ : unit,

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
∏ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
var i =
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   pr2
     (# (constprod_functor2
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
           (theory_presheaf L)) G m l))
  (invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl i)))
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
pr2 l =
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   pr2
     (# (constprod_functor2
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
           (theory_presheaf L)) G m l))
  (invmap stnweq (stnweq (inr tt)))

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
∏ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
var i =
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   pr2
     (# (constprod_functor2
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
           (theory_presheaf L)) G m l))
  (invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl i)))
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
var i =
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   pr2
     (# (constprod_functor2
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
           (theory_presheaf L)) G m l))
  (invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl i)))

          exact (!maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq _ (inl i))).
        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
pr2 l =
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   pr2
     (# (constprod_functor2
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
           (theory_presheaf L)) G m l))
  (invmap stnweq (stnweq (inr tt)))
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow n,
pr1 theory_presheaf_exponentiable
  (theory_presheaf L) ⟧
l: PO (S n) m : hSet
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   pr2
     (# (constprod_functor2
           (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
           (theory_presheaf L)) G m l)) (inr tt) =
pr2 l

          exact (maponpaths
            (λ x, pr1 x _ _)
            (id_right (BinProductPr2 _ (bin_products_presheaf_cat _ _ (theory_presheaf L))))
          ).
    Qed.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow (S n), theory_presheaf L ⟧
l: PO n m : hSet
(exp_lam_alt theory_presheaf_exponentiable G
 :
 presheaf_morphism
   ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
         (λ n0 : ℕ,
          Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
            (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)) n :=
       match
         n as n0
         return
           ((λ n1 : ℕ,
             Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L))
              n0)
       with
       | 0 =>
           Terminal_is_empty_product
             (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
             weqstn0toempty
       | S n0 =>
           (λ (n1 : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn
                     (presheaf_cat L)
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn,
                      theory_presheaf L)),
            n_power_to_sn_power
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) IHn) n0
             (F n0)
       end) n)
   (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
      (theory_presheaf L))) m l =
(G : presheaf_morphism (pow (S n)) (theory_presheaf L))
  (S m)
  (op l (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt)))

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow (S n), theory_presheaf L ⟧
l: PO n m : hSet
(exp_lam_alt theory_presheaf_exponentiable G
 :
 presheaf_morphism
   ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
         (λ n0 : ℕ,
          Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
            (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)) n :=
       match
         n as n0
         return
           ((λ n1 : ℕ,
             Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L))
              n0)
       with
       | 0 =>
           Terminal_is_empty_product
             (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
             weqstn0toempty
       | S n0 =>
           (λ (n1 : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn
                     (presheaf_cat L)
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn,
                      theory_presheaf L)),
            n_power_to_sn_power
              (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) IHn) n0
             (F n0)
       end) n)
   (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
      (theory_presheaf L))) m l =
(G : presheaf_morphism (pow (S n)) (theory_presheaf L))
  (S m)
  (op l (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt)))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
G: presheaf_cat L ⟦ pow (S n), theory_presheaf L ⟧
l: PO n m : hSet
φ_adj
  (pr2
     (coreflections_to_is_left_adjoint
        (λ T : presheaf_cat L,
         make_coreflection' (plus_1_presheaf T)
           (presheaf_exponent_morphism T)
           (λ f : coreflection_data T
                    (constprod_functor2
                       (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                       (theory_presheaf L)),
            make_coreflection_arrow
              (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism f)
              (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_commutes
                 f)
              (presheaf_exponent_induced_morphism_unique
                 f))))) G m l =
G (S m)
  (op l (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt)))

      exact (maponpaths (λ (x : presheaf_morphism (PO n) _), x _ _) (coreflections_to_are_adjoints_φ_adj _ _)).
    Qed.

  End Exponentiable.

  (** * 2. A construction of the lambda endomorphism theory of theory_presheaf *)

  
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
extend_tuple
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   f i • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (dni lastelement j)))
  (var lastelement) =
(λ i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn,
 let c := invmap stnweq i in
 coprod_rect
   (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n) : hSet)
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)

  
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
extend_tuple
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   f i • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (dni lastelement j)))
  (var lastelement) =
(λ i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn,
 let c := invmap stnweq i in
 coprod_rect
   (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n) : hSet)
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
∏ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
f i • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (dni lastelement j)) =
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl i)) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
var lastelement =
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inr tt)) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
∏ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
f i • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (dni lastelement j)) =
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl i)) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f i • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (dni lastelement j)) =
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl i)) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inl i)) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c) =
f i • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (dni lastelement j))

      exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq _ _)).
    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
var lastelement =
(let c := invmap stnweq (stnweq (inr tt)) in
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    f i' • (λ j : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
 exact (!maponpaths (λ x, let c := x in _) (homotinvweqweq _ _)).
  Qed.

  
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L

pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
presheaf_morphism
  (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
     (theory_presheaf L)) (theory_presheaf L)

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
IndexedSetCategory.indexed_set_cat ℕ
⟦ exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
    (theory_presheaf L), theory_presheaf L ⟧
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (m n : ℕ)
(a : exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
       (theory_presheaf L) m) 
(f : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n),
mor_op_ax (identity L) ?F
  (@op L
     (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
        (theory_presheaf L)))
  (@op L (theory_presheaf L)) m n a f

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
IndexedSetCategory.indexed_set_cat ℕ
⟦ exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
    (theory_presheaf L), theory_presheaf L ⟧
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
i: ℕ
exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable (theory_presheaf L)
  i → theory_presheaf L i

      apply abs.
    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (m n : ℕ)
(a : exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
       (theory_presheaf L) m) (f : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n),
mor_op_ax (identity L)
  ((λ i : ℕ, abs)
   :
   IndexedSetCategory.indexed_set_cat ℕ
   ⟦ exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
       (theory_presheaf L), theory_presheaf L ⟧)
  (@op L
     (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
        (theory_presheaf L)))
  (@op L (theory_presheaf L)) m n a f
 abstract (
        intros m n a f;
        refine (_ @ abs_subst _ _ _);
        apply (maponpaths (λ x, abs (a • x)));
        symmetry;
        apply presheaf_lambda_theory_aux
      ).
  Defined.

  
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
presheaf_morphism (theory_presheaf L)
  (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
     (theory_presheaf L))

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
IndexedSetCategory.indexed_set_cat ℕ
⟦ theory_presheaf L,
exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable (theory_presheaf L)
⟧
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (m n : ℕ) (a : theory_presheaf L m)
(f : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n),
mor_op_ax (identity L) ?F 
  (@op L (theory_presheaf L))
  (@op L
     (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
        (theory_presheaf L))) m n a f

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
IndexedSetCategory.indexed_set_cat ℕ
⟦ theory_presheaf L,
exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable (theory_presheaf L)
⟧
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
theory_presheaf L n
→ exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
    (theory_presheaf L) n

      apply appx.
    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (m n : ℕ) (a : theory_presheaf L m)
(f : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n),
mor_op_ax (identity L)
  ((λ n0 : ℕ, appx)
   :
   IndexedSetCategory.indexed_set_cat ℕ
   ⟦ theory_presheaf L,
   exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
     (theory_presheaf L) ⟧)
  (@op L (theory_presheaf L))
  (@op L
     (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
        (theory_presheaf L))) m n a f
 abstract (
        intros m n a f;
        refine (app_subst _ _ _ @ _);
        apply (maponpaths (λ x, appx a • x));
        apply presheaf_lambda_theory_aux
      ).
  Defined.

  
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
is_retraction reflexive_presheaf_abs
  reflexive_presheaf_app

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,

∏ n : ℕ,
(reflexive_presheaf_abs · reflexive_presheaf_app) n =
identity
  (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
     (theory_presheaf L)) n

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,

PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

(reflexive_presheaf_app n ∘ reflexive_presheaf_abs n)%functions =
identity
  (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
     (theory_presheaf L)) n

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
(reflexive_presheaf_app n ∘ reflexive_presheaf_abs n)%functions ~
identity
  (exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable
     (theory_presheaf L)) n

    exact (β_lambda_theory_has_β L n).
  Qed.

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
is_exponentiable ?BP ?X

bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

?C ⟦ exp ?E ?X, ?X ⟧

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

 exact reflexive_presheaf_abs.

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,

presheaf_cat L ⟦ theory_presheaf L,
exp theory_presheaf_exponentiable (theory_presheaf L)
⟧
 exact reflexive_presheaf_app.
    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
is_retraction reflexive_presheaf_abs
  reflexive_presheaf_app
 exact reflexive_presheaf_is_reflexive.
  Defined.

  (** * 3. An isomorphism between the two λ-theories *)

  Section Iso.

    Definition presheaf_lambda_theory
      : β_lambda_theory
      := reflexive_object_to_lambda_theory lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
algebraic_theory_morphism_data presheaf_lambda_theory
  L

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

algebraic_theory_morphism_data presheaf_lambda_theory
  L

n: ℕ
f: presheaf_lambda_theory n
L n

z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
algebraic_theory_morphism_data L
  presheaf_lambda_theory

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
algebraic_theory_morphism_data L
  presheaf_lambda_theory

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: L n
∏ (m n0 : ℕ) (a : PO n m) 
(f : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n0),
mor_op_ax (identity L) ?F 
  (@op L (PO n)) (@op L (theory_presheaf L)) m n0 a f

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

s: L n
n': ℕ
t: PO n n'
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
L n'

        exact (pow_f n n' t i).
      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: L n
∏ (m n0 : ℕ) (a : PO n m) (f : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n0),
mor_op_ax (identity L)
  ((λ (n' : ℕ) (t : PO n n'),
    s • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n n' t i))
   :
   IndexedSetCategory.indexed_set_cat ℕ ⟦ PO n,
   theory_presheaf L ⟧) (@op L (PO n))
  (@op L (theory_presheaf L)) m n0 a f
 abstract (
          intros;
          refine (_ @ !subst_subst _ s _ _);
          apply maponpaths;
          apply funextfun;
          intro;
          now rewrite mor_op
        ).
    Defined.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: L n : hSet
presheaf_to_L n (L_to_presheaf n l) = l

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: L n : hSet
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(pow_f_inv n · pow_f n) n var i = var i

      exact (maponpaths (λ x, pr1 x _ _ _) (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pow_iso n))).
    Qed.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
L_to_presheaf n (presheaf_to_L n l) = l

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
∏ n0 : ℕ,
L_to_presheaf n (presheaf_to_L n l) n0 = l n0

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L

z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
m: ℕ
x: PO n m
L_to_presheaf n (presheaf_to_L n l) m x = l m x

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
m: ℕ
x: PO n m
l m
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n m x i)) = l m x

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
m: ℕ
x: PO n m
op (pow_f_inv n n var)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n m x i) = x

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
m: ℕ
x: PO n m
pow_f_inv n m
  (op var (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n m x i)) = x

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
m: ℕ
x: PO n m
pr1 (pow_iso n · inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n)) m x =
pow_f_inv n m
  (op var (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n m x i))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
m: ℕ
x: PO n m
(inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n) m ∘ pow_iso n m)%functions
  x =
pow_f_inv n m
  (op var (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n m x i))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
m: ℕ
x: PO n m
pow_iso n m x =
op var (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n m x i)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
m: ℕ
x: PO n m
pow_iso n m x ~
op var (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n m x i)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
l: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
m: ℕ
x: PO n m
x0: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
pow_iso n m x x0 =
op var (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n m x i) x0

      exact (!var_subst _ _ _).
    Qed.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mor_var_ax L_to_presheaf n i

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mor_var_ax L_to_presheaf n i

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
∏ n0 : ℕ, L_to_presheaf n (var i) n0 = var i n0

pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

L_to_presheaf n (var i) m = var i m

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
m: ℕ
t: PO n m
L_to_presheaf n (var i) m t = var i m t

      apply var_subst.
    Qed.

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
mor_subst_ax L_to_presheaf m n f g

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
∏ n0 : ℕ,
L_to_presheaf n (f • g) n0 =
(L_to_presheaf m f
 • (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, L_to_presheaf n (g i))) n0

pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
l: ℕ
L_to_presheaf n (f • g) l =
(L_to_presheaf m f
 • (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, L_to_presheaf n (g i))) l

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
l: ℕ
L_to_presheaf n (f • g) l =
(L_to_presheaf m f l
 ∘ ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
     (reflexive_object_category
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
     (bin_product_power
        (reflexive_object_category
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object
        (reflexive_object_Terminal
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        (reflexive_object_BinProducts
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) m)
     (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, L_to_presheaf n (g i)) l)%functions

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L

z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
l: ℕ
L_to_presheaf n (f • g) l ~
(L_to_presheaf m f l
 ∘ ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
     (reflexive_object_category
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
     (bin_product_power
        (reflexive_object_category
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object
        (reflexive_object_Terminal
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        (reflexive_object_BinProducts
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) m)
     (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, L_to_presheaf n (g i)) l)%functions

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
