  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
l: ℕ
t: PO n l
L_to_presheaf n (f • g) l t =
(L_to_presheaf m f l
 ∘ ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
     (reflexive_object_category
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
     (bin_product_power
        (reflexive_object_category
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object
        (reflexive_object_Terminal
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        (reflexive_object_BinProducts
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) m)
     (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, L_to_presheaf n (g i)) l)%functions
  t

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
l: ℕ
t: PO n l
(L_to_presheaf m f l
 ∘ ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
     (reflexive_object_category
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
     (bin_product_power
        (reflexive_object_category
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object
        (reflexive_object_Terminal
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        (reflexive_object_BinProducts
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) m)
     (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, L_to_presheaf n (g i)) l)%functions
  t =
f
• (λ t_l : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   g t_l • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n l t i))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
l: ℕ
t: PO n l
(λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 pow_f m l
   (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
      (reflexive_object_category
         lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
      (bin_product_power
         (reflexive_object_category
            lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
         lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object
         (reflexive_object_Terminal
            lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
         (reflexive_object_BinProducts
            lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) m)
      (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, L_to_presheaf n (g i0)) l t)
   i) =
(λ t_l : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 g t_l • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n l t i))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
l: ℕ
t: PO n l
(λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 pow_f m l
   (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
      (reflexive_object_category
         lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
      (bin_product_power
         (reflexive_object_category
            lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
         lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object
         (reflexive_object_Terminal
            lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
         (reflexive_object_BinProducts
            lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) m)
      (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, L_to_presheaf n (g i0)) l t)
   i) ~
(λ t_l : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 g t_l • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n l t i))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
m, n: ℕ
f: L m : hSet
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n : hSet
l: ℕ
t: PO n l
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
pow_f m l
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
     (reflexive_object_category
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
     (bin_product_power
        (reflexive_object_category
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object
        (reflexive_object_Terminal
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)
        (reflexive_object_BinProducts
           lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) m)
     (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, L_to_presheaf n (g i)) l t) i =
g i • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pow_f n l t i)

      exact (maponpaths (λ x, x t) (!presheaf_mor_comp _ _ _) @
          maponpaths (λ x, pr1 x l t) (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ (pow m) _ _ i)).
    Qed.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
pr1 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var) =
op (pow_f_inv n n var)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
pr1 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var) =
op (pow_f_inv n n var)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
pr1 (pow_iso n · inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n)) (S n)
  ((pr111 (isProduct_Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
             (presheaf_cat L)
             ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                   Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
                     (presheaf_cat L)
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                      theory_presheaf L) :=
                 match
                   n as n0
                   return
                     (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                        (presheaf_cat L)
                        (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                         theory_presheaf L))
                 with
                 | 0 =>
                     Terminal_is_empty_product
                       (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                       (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                        theory_presheaf L)
                       weqstn0toempty
                 | S n0 =>
                     n_power_to_sn_power
                       (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                       (F n0)
                 end) n) (pow' (S n))
             (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
              ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (pow' (S n))
                (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i)))))
     (S n) var) =
pr1 (pow_iso n · inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n)) (S n)
  ((pr12 (PO n)) n (1 + n) (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
(inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n) (S n) ∘ pow_iso n (S n))%functions
  ((pr111 (isProduct_Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
             (presheaf_cat L)
             ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                   Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
                     (presheaf_cat L)
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                      theory_presheaf L) :=
                 match
                   n as n0
                   return
                     (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                        (presheaf_cat L)
                        (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                         theory_presheaf L))
                 with
                 | 0 =>
                     Terminal_is_empty_product
                       (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                       (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                        theory_presheaf L)
                       weqstn0toempty
                 | S n0 =>
                     n_power_to_sn_power
                       (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                       (F n0)
                 end) n) (pow' (S n))
             (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
              ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (pow' (S n))
                (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i)))))
     (S n) var) =
(inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n) (S n) ∘ pow_iso n (S n))%functions
  ((pr12 (PO n)) n (1 + n) (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
pow_iso n (S n)
  ((pr111 (isProduct_Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
             (presheaf_cat L)
             ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                   Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
                     (presheaf_cat L)
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                      theory_presheaf L) :=
                 match
                   n as n0
                   return
                     (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                        (presheaf_cat L)
                        (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                         theory_presheaf L))
                 with
                 | 0 =>
                     Terminal_is_empty_product
                       (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                       (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                        theory_presheaf L)
                       weqstn0toempty
                 | S n0 =>
                     n_power_to_sn_power
                       (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                       (F n0)
                 end) n) (pow' (S n))
             (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
              ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (pow' (S n))
                (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i)))))
     (S n) var) =
pow_iso n (S n)
  ((pr12 (PO n)) n (1 + n) (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
pow_iso n (S n)
  ((pr111 (isProduct_Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
             (presheaf_cat L)
             ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                   Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
                     (presheaf_cat L)
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                      theory_presheaf L) :=
                 match
                   n as n0
                   return
                     (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                        (presheaf_cat L)
                        (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                         theory_presheaf L))
                 with
                 | 0 =>
                     Terminal_is_empty_product
                       (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                       (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                        theory_presheaf L)
                       weqstn0toempty
                 | S n0 =>
                     n_power_to_sn_power
                       (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                       (F n0)
                 end) n) (pow' (S n))
             (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
              ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (pow' (S n))
                (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i)))))
     (S n) var) ~
pow_iso n (S n)
  ((pr12 (PO n)) n (1 + n) (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
pow_iso n (S n)
  ((pr111 (isProduct_Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
             (presheaf_cat L)
             ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                   Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
                     (presheaf_cat L)
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                      theory_presheaf L) :=
                 match
                   n as n0
                   return
                     (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                        (presheaf_cat L)
                        (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                         theory_presheaf L))
                 with
                 | 0 =>
                     Terminal_is_empty_product
                       (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                       (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                        theory_presheaf L)
                       weqstn0toempty
                 | S n0 =>
                     n_power_to_sn_power
                       (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                       (F n0)
                 end) n) (pow' (S n))
             (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
              ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (pow' (S n))
                (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i)))))
     (S n) var) i =
pow_iso n (S n)
  ((pr12 (PO n)) n (1 + n) (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))) i

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(pr11 (isProduct_Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                    (presheaf_cat L)
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                     theory_presheaf L))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product
                   (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power
                   (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
                   (F n0)
             end) n) (pow' (S n))
         (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
          ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
            (pow' (S n))
            (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i))))
 · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (pow n) i)
  (S n) var =
pow_iso n (S n)
  ((pr12 (PO n)) n (1 + n) (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))) i

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
pow_iso n (S n)
  ((pr12 (PO n)) n (1 + n) (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))) i =
pr1
  (ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
     (pow' (S n)) (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i)))
  (S n) var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
op (pow_f n n (pow_f_inv n n var))
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) i =
pr1
  (ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
     (pow' (S n)) (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i)))
  (S n) var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
op ((pow_f_inv n · pow_f n) n var)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) i =
pr1
  (ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
     (pow' (S n)) (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i)))
  (S n) var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
op (pr1 (identity (pow' n)) n var)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) i =
pr1
  (ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
     (pow' (S n)) (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl i)))
  (S n) var

      exact (var_subst _ _ _).
    Qed.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
presheaf_to_L (S n) (appx s) =
appx (presheaf_to_L n s)

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
presheaf_to_L (S n) (appx s) =
appx (presheaf_to_L n s)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
(s
 · reflexive_object_app
     lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) (S n)
  (pr1 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var))
• extend_tuple var (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var)) =
appx (presheaf_to_L n s)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
pr1
  (s
   · make_presheaf_morphism (@appx L)
       reflexive_presheaf_app_subproof) (S n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))
• extend_tuple var (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var)) =
appx (presheaf_to_L n s)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
op
  ((s
    · make_presheaf_morphism (@appx L)
        reflexive_presheaf_app_subproof) n
     (pow_f_inv n n var))
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))
• extend_tuple var (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var)) =
appx (presheaf_to_L n s)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
(s
 · make_presheaf_morphism (@appx L)
     reflexive_presheaf_app_subproof) n
  (pow_f_inv n n var)
• (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
   (let c := invmap stnweq t_l in
    coprod_rect
      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + S n))
      (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
       var (stnweq (inl i'))
       • (λ j : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
      (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) c)
   • extend_tuple var
       (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var))) =
appx (presheaf_to_L n s)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
(make_presheaf_morphism (@appx L)
   reflexive_presheaf_app_subproof n ∘ s n)%functions
  (pow_f_inv n n var)
• (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + S n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl i'))
      • (λ j : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
     (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i')))
     (invmap stnweq t_l)
   • extend_tuple var
       (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var))) =
appx (presheaf_to_L n s)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
(make_presheaf_morphism (@appx L)
   reflexive_presheaf_app_subproof n ∘ s n)%functions
  (pow_f_inv n n var)
• (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + S n))
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl i'))
      • (λ j : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
     (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i')))
     (invmap stnweq t_l)
   • extend_tuple var
       (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var))) =
appx (presheaf_to_L n s) • var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
(λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + S n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    var (stnweq (inl i'))
    • (λ j : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i')))
   (invmap stnweq t_l)
 • extend_tuple var (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var))) =
var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
(λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
 coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + S n))
   (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    var (stnweq (inl i'))
    • (λ j : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
   (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i')))
   (invmap stnweq t_l)
 • extend_tuple var (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var))) ~
var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + S n))
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl i'))
   • (λ j : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
  (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i')))
  (invmap stnweq i)
• extend_tuple var (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var)) =
var i

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)

i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i'))))

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
extend_tuple var (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var))
  (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i')))) =
var (stnweq (inl i'))

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
var
  (make_stn lastelement
     (dni lastelement (stnweq (inl i')))
     (dni_last_lt (stnweq (inl i')))) =
var (stnweq (inl i'))

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)

pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
make_stn lastelement
  (dni lastelement (stnweq (inl i')))
  (dni_last_lt (stnweq (inl i'))) = stnweq (inl i')

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (make_stn lastelement
     (dni lastelement (stnweq (inl i')))
     (dni_last_lt (stnweq (inl i')))) =
pr1 (stnweq (inl i'))

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
stnweq (inl i') < lastelement

        exact (stnlt (dni lastelement i')).
      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L (1 + S n))
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl i'))
   • (λ j : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl j))))
  (λ i' : unit, var (stnweq (inr i'))) (inr i')
• extend_tuple var (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var)) =
var (stnweq (inr i'))
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory n : hSet
i: (⟦ 1 + n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
extend_tuple var (pr2 (pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var))
  (stnweq (inr i')) = var (stnweq (inr i'))

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq _ _)).
    Qed.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
presheaf_to_L n (abs s) = abs (presheaf_to_L (S n) s)

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
presheaf_to_L n (abs s) = abs (presheaf_to_L (S n) s)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
(reflexive_object_abs
   lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object n
 ∘ exp_lam_alt
     (reflexive_object_exponentiable
        lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) s n)%functions
  (pow_f_inv n n var) = abs (presheaf_to_L (S n) s)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
exp_lam_alt
  (reflexive_object_exponentiable
     lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object) s n
  (pow_f_inv n n var) = presheaf_to_L (S n) s

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
s (S n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = presheaf_to_L (S n) s

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
op (pow_f_inv n n var)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
var (stnweq (inr tt)) = pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
pr1 (pow_iso (S n) · inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso (S n)))
  (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
(inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso (S n)) (1 + n)
 ∘ pow_iso (S n) (1 + n))%functions
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = pow_f_inv (S n) (S n) var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
pow_iso (S n) (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
pow_iso (S n) (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) ~ var

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
pow_iso (S n) (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) i = var i

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
pow_iso (S n) (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (invmap stnweq i)) =
var (stnweq (invmap stnweq i))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   presheaf_cat L
   ⟦ sn_power_object (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
           end) n), theory_presheaf L ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L))
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
           end) n) i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L)))
  (invmap stnweq i) (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) =
var (stnweq (invmap stnweq i))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   presheaf_cat L
   ⟦ sn_power_object (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
           end) n), theory_presheaf L ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L))
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
           end) n) i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L))) (inl i')
  (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = var (stnweq (inl i'))
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   presheaf_cat L
   ⟦ sn_power_object (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn 
               (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn 
                  (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) 
                 (F n0)
           end) n), theory_presheaf L ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn 
                (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product 
                   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn 
                   (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) 
                  (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L))
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn 
       (presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn 
               (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn 
                  (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) 
                 (F n0)
           end) n) i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn 
                (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product 
                   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn 
                   (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) 
                  (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L))) 
  (inr i') (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = 
var (stnweq (inr i'))

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,

PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   presheaf_cat L
   ⟦ sn_power_object (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
           end) n), theory_presheaf L ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L))
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
           end) n) i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
