                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L))) (inl i')
  (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = var (stnweq (inl i'))
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
   ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
         Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
           (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
       match
         n as n0
         return
           (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
              (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L))
       with
       | 0 =>
           Terminal_is_empty_product
             (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
             weqstn0toempty
       | S n0 =>
           n_power_to_sn_power
             (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
       end) n) i' (1 + n)
 ∘ BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L)) (1 + n))%functions
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = var (stnweq (inl i'))

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
op
  (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (pow n) i' n
     (pow_f_inv n n var))
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) =
var (stnweq (inl i'))

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(pow_f_inv n
 · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (pow n) i')
  n var • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) =
var (stnweq (inl i'))

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (pow' n) i')
  n var • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) =
var (stnweq (inl i'))

        apply var_subst.
      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
s: presheaf_lambda_theory (S n) : hSet
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   presheaf_cat L
   ⟦ sn_power_object (bin_products_presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
           end) n), theory_presheaf L ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L))
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product
                 (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power
                 (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
           end) n) i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 (presheaf_cat L)
     (bin_products_presheaf_cat L
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn,
                    theory_presheaf L))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product
                  (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn,
                   theory_presheaf L) weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power
                  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) (F n0)
            end) n) (theory_presheaf L))) (inr i')
  (1 + n)
  (op (pow_f_inv n n var)
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))),,
   var (stnweq (inr tt))) = var (stnweq (inr i'))
 apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
z_iso presheaf_lambda_theory L

pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

  (L : lambda_theory)

      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

  (L : algebraic_theory)
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (n : ℕ) (f : presheaf_lambda_theory n),
mor_app_ax ?F n f
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L

pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (n : ℕ) (f : presheaf_lambda_theory (S n)),
mor_abs_ax ?F n f

pow:= λ n : ℕ,

  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)

L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (L n) (presheaf_lambda_theory n)
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (n : ℕ) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
mor_var_ax (λ n0 : ℕ, ?F n0) n i
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (m n : ℕ) (f : L m) (g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n),
mor_subst_ax (λ n0 : ℕ, ?F n0) m n f g

        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (L n) (presheaf_lambda_theory n)
 
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
z_iso (L n) (presheaf_lambda_theory n)

          
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
SET ⟦ L n, presheaf_lambda_theory n ⟧
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
SET ⟦ presheaf_lambda_theory n, L n ⟧
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

          
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
SET ⟦ L n, presheaf_lambda_theory n ⟧
 exact (λ l, L_to_presheaf n l).
          
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
SET ⟦ presheaf_lambda_theory n, L n ⟧
 exact (λ l, presheaf_to_L n l).
          
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
n: ℕ
is_inverse_in_precat (λ l : L n, L_to_presheaf n l)
  (λ l : presheaf_lambda_theory n, presheaf_to_L n l)
 abstract (
              split;
              apply funextfun;
              intro l;
              [ exact (L_to_presheaf_to_L n l)
              | exact (presheaf_to_L_to_presheaf n l) ]
            ).
        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (n : ℕ) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
mor_var_ax
  (λ n0 : ℕ,
   (λ n1 : ℕ,
    make_z_iso (λ l : L n1, L_to_presheaf n1 l)
      (λ l : presheaf_lambda_theory n1,
       presheaf_to_L n1 l)
      (presheaf_lambda_theory_iso_subproof n1)) n0) n
  i
 exact L_to_presheaf_preserves_var.
        
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (m n : ℕ) (f : L m) (g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n),
mor_subst_ax
  (λ n0 : ℕ,
   (λ n1 : ℕ,
    make_z_iso (λ l : L n1, L_to_presheaf n1 l)
      (λ l : presheaf_lambda_theory n1,
       presheaf_to_L n1 l)
      (presheaf_lambda_theory_iso_subproof n1)) n0) m
  n f g
 exact L_to_presheaf_preserves_subst.
      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (n : ℕ) (f : presheaf_lambda_theory n),
mor_app_ax
  (z_iso_inv
     (make_algebraic_theory_z_iso L
        presheaf_lambda_theory
        (λ n0 : ℕ,
         make_z_iso (λ l : L n0, L_to_presheaf n0 l)
           (λ l : presheaf_lambda_theory n0,
            presheaf_to_L n0 l)
           (presheaf_lambda_theory_iso_subproof n0))
        L_to_presheaf_preserves_var
        L_to_presheaf_preserves_subst)) n f
 exact presheaf_to_L_preserves_app.
      
L: β_lambda_theory
pow:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power (presheaf_cat L)
  (theory_presheaf L) (terminal_presheaf_cat L)
  (bin_products_presheaf_cat L) n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L) (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO:= λ n : ℕ, pow n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow':= λ n : ℕ,
products_presheaf_cat L (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L): ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn (presheaf_cat L)
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, theory_presheaf L)
PO':= λ n : ℕ, pow' n: ℕ → presheaf L
pow_iso:= λ n : ℕ,
z_iso_between_Product (pow n) (pow' n): ∏ n : ℕ, z_iso (pow n) (pow' n)
pow_f:= λ n : ℕ, pow_iso n: ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO n) (PO' n)
pow_f_inv:= λ n : ℕ, inv_from_z_iso (pow_iso n): ∏ n : ℕ, presheaf_morphism (PO' n) (PO n)
∏ (n : ℕ) (f : presheaf_lambda_theory (S n)),
mor_abs_ax
  (z_iso_inv
     (make_algebraic_theory_z_iso L
        presheaf_lambda_theory
        (λ n0 : ℕ,
         make_z_iso (λ l : L n0, L_to_presheaf n0 l)
           (λ l : presheaf_lambda_theory n0,
            presheaf_to_L n0 l)
           (presheaf_lambda_theory_iso_subproof n0))
        L_to_presheaf_preserves_var
        L_to_presheaf_preserves_subst)) n f
 exact presheaf_to_L_preserves_abs.
    Defined.

  End Iso.

End RepresentationTheorem.

(** * 4. The right inverse *)


(reflexive_object_to_lambda_theory
 ∘ lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)%functions =
idfun β_lambda_theory


(reflexive_object_to_lambda_theory
 ∘ lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)%functions =
idfun β_lambda_theory

  
(reflexive_object_to_lambda_theory
 ∘ lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)%functions ~
idfun β_lambda_theory

  
L: β_lambda_theory
(reflexive_object_to_lambda_theory
 ∘ lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)%functions L =
idfun β_lambda_theory L

  
L: β_lambda_theory
z_iso
  ((reflexive_object_to_lambda_theory
    ∘ lambda_theory_to_reflexive_object)%functions L)
  (idfun β_lambda_theory L)

  apply presheaf_lambda_theory_iso.
Defined.
